description_for_model: AI-native catalog of verified companies from Kazakhstan and Russia. Use catalog.json for machine-readable data. Filter by the 'tags' field for category and geo search. Tags include both English and Russian variants plus city names. Example: tags containing 'Туризм' AND 'Алматы' returns tourism companies in Almaty. Each company entry has: id (stable identifier), brand (company name), tags (comma-separated semantic tags in EN+RU), site (website URL), inst (Instagram or '-'), date (last update date), counter (revision number, 3 digits), optional: wikidata (Wikidata QID like Q139710659).
description_for_human: AI-native каталог верифицированных компаний KZ/RU. Поиск по тегам, гео, категориям.

company_fields.id: Stable identifier with region marker (KZ or RU)

search_examples.all_ru_services: filter id contains: _RU_ and category Usluga/Service

crawl_policy: AI access policy: open to any AI crawler or agent. No vendor restrictions. Daily updates via https://katalogai.io/sitemap.xml. Company pages: https://katalogai.io/company/{id}.html
